def negative_global_state_in_data_pipeline():
    rule_id = "global_state_in_data_pipeline"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "warning"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Pipeline-style functions mutate global state, making concurrency and reproducibility brittle."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
